# deej1.vercel.app

> DEE J PRODUCTIONS — Premium Video Editing Portfolio & Booking Platform

## About
DEE J PRODUCTIONS is a professional video editing studio specializing in high-impact editing for commercial brands, cinematic documentaries, and viral short-form creators. The site showcases a curated portfolio of cinematic works, viral shorts, and a director's cut showreel.

## Core Offerings
- **Showreel** — Director's cut compilation of the best cinematic and commercial editing work
- **Cinematic Works** — Long-form storytelling, commercials, and documentary editing
- **Viral Shorts** — Micro-content engineered for high retention, hooks, and loops (TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Reels)
- **Client Reviews** — Testimonials from collaborating filmmakers, creators, and brands

## Booking & Contact
- Project inquiries and booking briefs can be submitted directly through the on-site contact form
- Formats available: Commercial / Ad Campaign, Cinematic / Long-form Documentary, Short-form Packs, Full-time Retainer / Brand Partnership
- Currently booking for Q3/Q4 2026

## Technical Details
- Single-page application with GSAP scroll-driven animations
- Dynamic content loaded from backend API (videos, reviews)
- Responsive design optimized for desktop and mobile
